items.zh: 越来越多的大学生意识到，良好的睡眠对学习效率至关重要。
items.en_reference: More and more college students realize that good sleep is crucial to learning efficiency.

items.zh: 这位教授鼓励学生通过提问来培养批判性思维能力。
items.en_reference: The professor encourages students to develop critical thinking skills by asking questions.

items.zh: 随着互联网技术的飞速发展，在线教育已成为一种广受欢迎的学习方式。
items.en_reference: With the rapid development of internet technology, online education has become a widely popular way of learning.

items.zh: 政府正在采取一系列措施来减少城市中的空气污染。
items.en_reference: The government is taking a series of measures to reduce air pollution in cities.

items.zh: 坚持锻炼不仅能增强体质，还能有效缓解学习压力。
items.en_reference: Regular exercise not only strengthens physical fitness but also effectively relieves study pressure.

items.zh: 中国传统文化在全球范围内的影响力正在不断增强。
items.en_reference: The influence of traditional Chinese culture is continuously growing on a global scale.

items.zh: 大学生应该充分利用课余时间拓展自己的知识面和技能。
items.en_reference: College students should make full use of their spare time to broaden their knowledge and skills.

items.zh: 共享经济的兴起为人们提供了更多便利，但同时也带来了新的挑战。
items.en_reference: The rise of the sharing economy has provided people with more convenience while bringing new challenges.

items.zh: 越来越多的年轻人选择在大城市创业，以实现自己的职业梦想。
items.en_reference: More and more young people choose to start businesses in big cities to realize their career dreams.

items.zh: 保护生态环境是每位公民的责任，也是可持续发展的基础。
items.en_reference: Protecting the ecological environment is the responsibility of every citizen and the foundation of sustainable development.
